differential_diagnoses: Hypertrophic pachymeningitis (e.g., IgG4-related disease or granulomatous meningitis)
next_steps: Brain and leptomeningeal biopsy of a representative nodular lesion
Histopathological analysis with immunohistochemical staining (S100, HMB-45, Melan-A, MITF, Ki-67)
Genetic analysis of biopsy tissue for GNAQ/GNA11 and BRAF mutations
Total body PET/CT and dermatologic/ophthalmologic evaluation to exclude occult primary melanoma
Repeat MRI of the head with contrast for surgical planning and current disease assessment
Cerebrospinal fluid analysis for cytology and high-sensitivity flow cytometry (repeat)
